body.title: Consult primitive: ConsultSession (multi-turn peer-LLM consultation)
body.result: ConsultSession class + consult() one-shot + ConsultResult/ConsultConclusion + tier routing + JSON parse tolerance + forensic logging + inline default prompts. 28 tests. 666abf74.
body.description:
Build wild_igor/igor/cognition/consult.py exposing ConsultSession (stateful multi-turn class) + consult() one-shot helper. Igor's unified mechanism for 'I'm stuck, help me understand — don't solve' consults. Replaces the handoff-shape LLM escalation with peer-shape consultation; same primitive for reasoning-stuck AND coding-stuck paths.

Session is multi-turn: Igor can ask → receive hypotheses → reason → ask follow-up → conclude. Not a single query/reply. LLM context accumulates across session turns. session.ask(question) → ConsultResult; session.conclude() → ConsultConclusion.

Optional tier_override parameter (defaults to tier.3); routes through inference_gateway.chat() so transport-agnostic (ollama/openrouter/future-subprocess-claude).

**Affected files:** new wild_igor/igor/cognition/consult.py, tests/test_consult_primitive.py
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not, oop-first
**Scope boundary:** IN — ConsultSession class, ConsultState dataclass, ConsultResult dataclass, ConsultConclusion dataclass, consult() one-shot helper, transcript logging to igor.consult logger + consults.log forensic file. OUT — prompt templates (T-consult-prompts), call sites (T-consult-pe-chain-wire, T-consult-reasoning-wire), confab scanning (T-consult-confab-scan), observe ticket (T-consult-observe-and-tune).
**Test plan:** unit tests with mocked inference_gateway.chat() — verify session accumulates context across turns, tier_override passes through, logger fires for every turn, forensic log appended, ConsultConclusion sums correctly across multi-turn. No flag gating.
